BackstoryDef.title: Livestreamer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years amassing a following livestreaming themselves on the internet. [PAWN_pronoun] went by the name "Jermanoid985", usually playing video games, but most of the viewers came for [PAWN_nameDef]'s magnetic and funny personality. The penultimate stream [PAWN_pronoun] did was pretending to be a controllable pawn in a video game, where the chat would be in complete control of [PAWN_possessive] life for about 3 days.
